title: Redstone Producer Component
description: If added to a block, indicates that it produces a redstone signal.

connected_faces.description: The list of faces that are considered connected to the circuit.

power.description: The strength of the redstone signal produced by this block.

strongly_powered_face.description: The block touching this face will become strongly powered with the signal level strength of 'power'.

transform_relative.description: If true, the strongly_powered_face and connected_faces properties will be rotated according to the minecraft:transformation component.
